name: Cave Entrance
description: A dark opening in the rock face. Cold air flows out, carrying the smell of damp stone and old bones. The path leads down into the earth.
ambient: Water drips somewhere in the darkness.
The wind whistles through the narrow entrance.
A few pale roots dangle from the ceiling, motionless.

interaction_rules.text: Your voice echoes down the tunnel, bouncing back as a distorted murmur.
The root is dry and brittle. It snaps off in your hand with a soft crack.
